productDisplayName: Fastrack Men Beach Upgrades Analog White Watch

Stylish and with a unique numbering format, its a must have for those who love to dress differently.Case diameter: 50 mmCase thickness: 5 mmDial shape: Round Steel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfort Plastic strap with a tang clasp for comfort and style Blue hands Date and day indicator at 2 'o clock position Quartz movement of time display Screw to reset time, day and date Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability
